---
title: "Check payment Info"
description: "Learn about our endpoints to retrieve information about one or multiple payments."
---

<Info>
  The data structure may vary depending on the transaction type. Do not rely on a fixed schema; always validate the returned type and its data for each transaction.
</Info>

## Getting Transaction details

```shellscript
GET https://api.starkfi.io/payment/:id/status
```

<Steps>
  <Step title="Getting crypto payment details">
    ```json expandable
    {
        "statusCode": 200,
        "success": true,
        "status": "payment_found",
        "message": "Payment found.",
        "data": {
            "id": "cmodi78b2000101pjezst1ics",
            "status": "error",
            "executor_id": "api_transaction",
            "order_code": null,
            "tenant_data": {
                "country": "brazil",
                "pix_enabled": true,
                "webhook_url": "https://webhook.site/9abdc6ad-4956-4d8c-b4d5-06eaffa30bce",
                "public_client_id": "cmngy66mw0000e6y0uowcbxgf",
                "bank_account_enabled": true,
                "payment_method_allowed": {
                    "crypto": true,
                    "cardfiat": true,
                    "pixcrypto": true,
                    "cardcrypto": true
                }
            },
            "payer_email": "dev.caiqueberingui@gmail.com",
            "payer_wallet": "0x9b57847b69D0354837F7b723133B9dBCbefb4F9F",
            "payer_token_symbol": "USDT",
            "transaction_type": "crypto",
            "payer_cpf": null,
            "tid_hash": null,
            "split_payment_config": [
                {
                    "receiver_wallet": "0x9b57847b69D0354837F7b723133B9dBCbefb4F9F",
                    "receiver_percent": 100
                }
            ],
            "global_payment_data": {
                "message": "This details is available only for fiat payments"
            },
            "from_currency_symbol": "BRL",
            "amount_from": "30",
            "amount_to": "0.05994485073732166",
            "to_currency_symbol": "USDT",
            "chain_name": "arbitrum",
            "from_chain": "arbitrum",
            "to_chain": "arbitrum",
            "on_ramp": false,
            "unsigned_tx": {
                "meta": {
                    "source": "evm_split"
                },
                "family": "evm",
                "chain_name": "arbitrum",
                "schema_version": 1,
                "transactionRequest": {
                    "to": "0x23183C87c9c6668edf5974893905AF475c3664c9",
                    "data": "",
                    "from": "0x9b57847b69D0354837F7b723133B9dBCbefb4F9F",
                    "nonce": 36,
                    "value": 0,
                    "chainId": 42161,
                    "gasLimit": "82499",
                    "maxFeePerGas": "52514800",
                    "maxPriorityFeePerGas": "0"
                }
            },
            "signed_tx": null,
            "data_error": {
                "code": "invalid_payment_status",
                "status": "error",
                "details": null,
                "message": "Payment transaction is not in a valid status for execution"
            },
            "session_payment": "https://lab-app.starknode.io/sessions/payment?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9..21mL8u2M2cpki6umaFHlU2aCc8fhVrMEu2L711KtznU",
            "metadata": null,
            "created_at": "2026-04-24T22:50:16.910Z",
            "updated_at": "2026-04-24T22:56:40.108Z"
        }
    }
    ```
  </Step>
  <Step title="Getting on-ramp payment details">
    ```json expandable
    {
        "statusCode": 200,
        "success": true,
        "status": "payment_found",
        "message": "Payment found.",
        "data": {
            "id": "cmodhqf38000001pjju9kxlmb",
            "status": "success",
            "executor_id": "api_transaction",
            "order_code": null,
            "tenant_data": {
                "country": "brazil",
                "pix_enabled": true,
                "webhook_url": "https://webhook.site/9abdc6ad-4956-4d8c-b4d5-06eaffa30bce",
                "public_client_id": "cmngy66mw0000e6y0uowcbxgf",
                "bank_account_enabled": true,
                "payment_method_allowed": {
                    "crypto": true,
                    "cardfiat": true,
                    "pixcrypto": true,
                    "cardcrypto": true
                }
            },
            "payer_email": "satoshi@starkfi.io",
            "payer_wallet": "",
            "payer_token_symbol": null,
            "transaction_type": "pixcrypto",
            "payer_cpf": "***.***.***-25",
            "tid_hash": "0x3d1dc00ae7cb7bebecd395a264e6656604fdfebb9d1fd7d1bf291601ba31e643",
            "split_payment_config": [
                {
                    "receiver_wallet": "0x9b57847b69D0354837F7b723133B9dBCbefb4F9F",
                    "receiver_percent": 100
                }
            ],
            "global_payment_data": {
                "code": 201,
                "txid": "282910f46cb6420388c9887a",
                "chave": "3254cbd2-75e5-4034-abdb-ba8eebcee742",
                "valor": {
                    "original": 0.3,
                    "modalidadeAlteracao": 0
                },
                "status": "paid",
                "devedor": {
                    "cnpj": "00000000000000",
                    "nome": ""
                },
                "revisao": 0,
                "location": "brcode.starkinfra.com/v2/ad6147d628b6492d8faa4ab4f3afb623",
                "calendario": {
                    "criacao": "2026-04-24T19:37:30.608Z",
                    "expiracao": 3600
                },
                "confirmed_at": "24/04/2026, 19:39:15",
                "pixCopiaECola": "235204000053039865802BR59254PA4Lins62070503***63047A85",
                "infoAdicionais": [],
                "payment_details": {
                    "status": "paid",
                    "confirmed_at": "24/04/2026, 19:39:15"
                },
                "solicitacaoPagador": "Payment on-ramp transaction from api_transaction",
                "crypto_payment_details": {
                    "chain_name": "Arbitrum",
                    "amount_usdt": "0.05778",
                    "receiver_wallet": "0x9b57847b69D0354837F7b723133B9dBCbefb4F9F",
                    "transaction_hash": "0x5d1b672614fb49e36791b89ce63ba2b0e36815e2455c6f3df13a658dd19bcdaa"
                }
            },
            "from_currency_symbol": "BRL",
            "amount_from": "30",
            "amount_to": "0.05992928344553427",
            "to_currency_symbol": "USDT",
            "chain_name": "arbitrum",
            "from_chain": "arbitrum",
            "to_chain": "arbitrum",
            "on_ramp": false,
            "unsigned_tx": null,
            "signed_tx": null,
            "data_error": null,
            "session_payment": "https://lab-app.starknode.io/sessions/payment?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9..xg4kUiPaACT-CKXhkQOAWqOjakb3t7vaSuNt7cD6JdM",
            "metadata": null,
            "created_at": "2026-04-24T22:37:12.548Z",
            "updated_at": "2026-04-24T22:39:32.225Z"
        }
    }
    ```
  </Step>
  <Step title="Getting credit card payment details">
    ```json expandable
    {
        "statusCode": 200,
        "success": true,
        "status": "payment_found",
        "message": "Payment found.",
        "data": {
            "id": "cmodmglpw000101o4sucrw1s0",
            "status": "registered",
            "executor_id": "api_transaction",
            "order_code": null,
            "tenant_data": {
                "country": "brazil",
                "pix_enabled": true,

                "bank_account_enabled": true,

                    "crypto": true,
                    "cardfiat": true,

                    "cardcrypto": true

            "transaction_type": "cardcrypto",
            "payer_cpf": null,
            "tid_hash": null,

                {
                    "receiver_wallet": "0x9b57847b69D0354837F7b723133B9dBCbefb4F9F",

                "id": "or_YXzQWXYTW7IMlaZK",

                    {
                        "id": "ch_8YDGnPVHRuZNjml5",
                        "code": "cmodmglpw000101o4sucrw1s0",

                        "created_at": "2026-04-25T00:49:46Z",

                            },

                            "status": "failed",

                            "metadata": {},

                            "operation_type": "auth_and_capture",

                                "code": "400",

                                    {

                    }
                ],

                    "delinquent": false,
                    "updated_at": "2026-04-25T00:49:45Z",

                },

                    "payment_id": "cmodmglpw000101o4sucrw1s0"

                "checkouts": [],
                "closed_at": "2026-04-25T00:49:46Z",
                "created_at": "2026-04-25T00:49:46Z",

                "updated_at": "2026-04-25T00:49:46Z"
            },
            "from_currency_symbol": "BRL",
            "amount_from": "30",
            "amount_to": "0.05994005994005994",
            "to_currency_symbol": "USDT",

            "from_chain": "arbitrum",
            "to_chain": "arbitrum",
            "on_ramp": false,
            "unsigned_tx": null,
            "signed_tx": null,
            "data_error": null,
            "session_payment": "https://lab-app.starknode.io/sessions/payment?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9..YD6t-4WpVQ45KtPYmYe2CGvObDrTTqbRPbFO5kVDBPQ",
            "metadata": null,

    }
    ```
  </Step>
</Steps>

The data for this entity can be retrieved through this `GET` endpoint. Additionally, this information is automatically delivered via webhook whenever a trigger action occurs, ensuring real-time updates.

The `status` field is an enum and may assume the following values:

- `SUCCESS` — operation completed successfully
- `ERROR` — processing failed
- `PENDING` — operation in progress or awaiting review
- `REPROVED` — operation rejected
